decisions: The console follows the Phase 4 workspace API contract without adding a Clerk browser SDK dependency.
A missing workspace-list route falls back to the active workspace so local single-workspace development remains usable.
Only admins receive workspace settings/member routes; provider OAuth configuration remains visible to managers and admins.
blockers: The documented workspace list, switch, settings, and member-management API routes are absent from the current server tree, so their browser interactions could not be verified end to end.
